//: Scoped to this dir ONLY so bun can resolve the @/ alias when running verify-subject-cleanup.mjs headlessly. The Next app resolves @/ via next.config.mjs's webpack alias and has no root tsconfig; this file lives in a subdir so it never affects `next build` or the editor's view of src/. baseUrl is this dir's ../.. (the repo root). The exact @/lib/megashader key wins over @/* and points at the no-op stub.
